name: Boudewijn Vroomans
role: Senior Scrum Master and Agile Coach
summary: Accomplished Agile practitioner with over 12 years of experience driving organizational transformation and team performance. Expert in scaling Scrum frameworks and fostering high-trust environments to deliver complex software solutions in fast-paced enterprise settings.

experience.title: Senior Agile Coach
experience.description: Leading the enterprise-wide transition to SAFe for a 200-person engineering department. Mentoring middle management on servant leadership and optimizing value stream mapping to reduce delivery lead times by 30 percent.

experience.title: Scrum Master
experience.description: Facilitated Scrum ceremonies for three cross-functional squads. Successfully coached teams through a transition from Waterfall to Kanban, resulting in a significant increase in sprint velocity and stakeholder satisfaction.

experience.title: Junior Scrum Master
experience.description: Supported product owners in backlog refinement and user story mapping. Managed team impediments and promoted continuous improvement through data-driven retrospectives.

education.degree: Master of Science in Business Administration
Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
